description_long: This is a modern, minimalist shelving unit constructed entirely from transparent glass panels. The structure features three main horizontal shelves, each supported by vertical glass sides, forming a stepped, zigzag profile when viewed from the side. The edges of the glass are slightly green-tinted, a characteristic of thick, high-quality glass. The open design allows for visibility and access from all sides, making it suitable for displaying decorative items or storing books in urban environments such as lobbies, galleries, or upscale retail spaces. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy enough to support moderate weights. The overall aesthetic is sleek, contemporary, and visually light, blending seamlessly into modern urban interiors.
description: A transparent, stepped glass shelving unit with three open shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is visually light and suitable for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped, zigzag profile and the three distinct glass shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the shelves and the open, transparent design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stepped profile and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the alignment of the shelves and the clear, open back.
